name: fixture-react-router-v7-vercel-preset
description: Integration fixture reproducing issue #1: React Router v7 on Vite 8 with @vercel/react-router's vercelPreset(). The preset splits the server build into per-function bundles (build/server/nodejs_*/); this fixture guards that the emitted .node addon survives into each bundle that references it. Installed in isolation so it can run Vite 8 without conflicting with the vite-6 example.
